div.div:
• Isolate the instance by placing
it in a separate security group.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 275px; margin-left: 742px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: 'Amazon Ember'; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
• Protect the instance from
accidental termination with the
disableApiTermination
attribute. (See the following
API command.)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 367px; margin-left: 742px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #3A3A3A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: 'Courier New'; color: light-dark(#3A3A3A, #bbbbbb); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
> aws ec2 modify-instance-
attribute --instance-id i-
a123 --groups sg-isolated

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 449px; margin-left: 742px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #3A3A3A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: 'Courier New'; color: light-dark(#3A3A3A, #bbbbbb); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
> aws ec2 modify-instance-
attribute --instance-id i-
a123 --attribute
disableApiTermination --
value true

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
